Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Chimeric Mantle Twilight Regalia Energy Shield: 1190 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.8972 Unique ID: be5a4d54e7867c608d152e4add24303f76d8790e0128a65022bff8bbd56739b9 Item Level: 86 Quality: 23 Sockets: G-B-B-B-G-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 3 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Defence Modifier magnitudes 7% Chance to Block Attack Damage 13% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills {fractured}10% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills +97 to maximum Energy Shield 145% increased Energy Shield +44% to Fire Resistance 14% increased Stun and Block Recovery {crafted}3% additional Physical Damage Reduction
